data.title: Lead Real Estate's ENT TERRACE GINZA PREMIUM wins Luxury Apartments of the Year in Kantō. Affluent travelers favor residential-style experiences.
data.description: In its inaugural year, LRE's unique "Stay Like Living" concept has garnered global recognition, showcasing its appeal among affluent travelers seeking genuine, homelike experiences. This validation comes as no surprise, with the concept resonating strongly among discerning travelers who value authenticity and residential-style accommodations. The rapid success of LRE's approach is underscored by the impressive number of accolades and acknowledgments received, highlighting its relevance and popularity within the luxury travel sector.

data.title: Bitcoin down 6% at $87,000, Gold up 70% to $4,500 in 2025. Bitcoin infrastructure milestones achieved, gold sees record high.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is currently hovering around $87,000, marking a 6.4% decrease in 2025. Meanwhile, gold, tracked by the iShares Gold Trust (NYSE: GLD), has surged by over 70%, reaching an all-time peak exceeding $4,500 this year. Bitcoin has made significant strides, achieving feats that were once deemed unattainable five years ago. Various entities, including BlackRock Inc. (NYSE: BLK), Grayscale, and Fidelity Investments, have allocated over $132 billion into spot ETFs. Company Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) has amassed more than 200,000 BTC. Furthermore, corporate treasuries have embraced Bitcoin as a legitimate diversification tool, collectively holding over 1 million BTC in digital asset reserves. For more information, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Federal order postpones retirement of NIPSCO's R.M. Schahfer Generating Station past Dec. 31, 2025.
data.description: In Merrillville, Indiana, NIPSCO has been mandated by a federal order to keep operating its R.M. Schahfer Generating Station past the scheduled retirement date of December 31, 2025.

data.title: New CEO Dr. Paul Krakovitz to lead Cone Health starting March 16, 2026, after nationwide search.
data.description: A renowned surgeon, Dr. Paul Krakovitz, will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer at Cone Health, a prominent regional health system, in March 2026. The announcement was made on December 23, 2025, in Greensboro, N.C. Dr. Krakovitz, FACS, was selected after a thorough search process. His tenure is set to begin on March 16.
A military source in the Sudanese army: It has been confirmed that the commander of the 22nd Division was killed during the rapid support forces' takeover of Bab Nosah in early December.

data.title: $1 stablecoin market cap boosted by $150M via Binance program giving up to 20% yield; Trump family-linked supply surges.
data.description: Following Binance's announcement of an incentive program providing up to 20% yield, the market capitalization of the USD1 stablecoin increased by $150 million.

data.title: Kuwait's construction industry set to grow by 3.9% annually from 2025, driven by investments in renewable energy and infrastructure.
data.description: A report on the Kuwait construction market has been newly included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The industry is expected to see a resurgence in growth starting in 2025, with an anticipated annual growth rate of 3.9% in real terms. This growth will be driven by government investments in sectors such as renewable energy and transport infrastructure. The report provides insights into market trends and forecasts by sector, including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, up to 2029.

data.title: Oak Row Equities, OKO Group, and Mariposa Real Estate acquire $520M waterfront land deal, financed with $464.5M loan from TYKO Capital.
data.description: In Miami, Oak Row Equities, OKO Group, and Mariposa Real Estate have recently finalized the largest land acquisition in Florida's history. The collaboration between Oak Row Equities, a prominent real estate private equity and development firm with a portfolio exceeding $4 billion in South Florida, OKO Group led by Vlad Doronin, and Mariposa Real Estate, concluded the purchase of Aimco's significant 4.25-acre waterfront parcel for a hefty sum of $520 million.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urging SOAR, HTBK, WBD, CVBF shareholders to contact firm about potential violations. Call before rights expire. Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: Investors are urged to reach out to the company promptly as the window to assert their rights may be short. In a recent report on December 24, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, disclosed their examination of various firms for potential infringements of federal securities regulations and/or breaches...

data.title: Cizzle Brands Corp acquired Flow Water Inc.'s co-manufacturing business. Cizzle Offers:  Cboe Canada: CZZL.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) has successfully acquired Flow Water Inc., purchasing all shares from RI Flow Sub LLC. The acquisition was finalized through a definitive share purchase agreement, with Cizzle Brands Acquisition Inc. as the direct buyer, a subsidiary of Cizzle Brands Corporation. This move solidifies Cizzle's position in the market and strengthens its portfolio. The specific financial details and figures involved in the acquisition were not disclosed publicly.
